title: astragalus cuyanus
intro: Astragalus cuyanus, a type of flowering plant in the legume family, is native to South America and is also known as Queñoa or Cuyahuasi. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cuyanus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal supplements to provide its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
